## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet build` and `dotnet test` pass.
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavior changes (xUnit + Shouldly).
- [ ] Updated affected docs in `docs/project/`.
- [ ] If the snapshot shape changed: bumped `SnapshotSchema.Version` and updated
      `schema/snapshot.v0.schema.json` + `snapshot-schema.md`.
- [ ] No new privacy exposure (no full paths, credentials, or save data in snapshots).
